items.question: How is my song created and what makes it unique?
items.answer: Unlike generic gifts, every ApolloSong is born from *your* story. Our professional lyricists and producers transform your feelings into radio-quality verses and melodies. It’s a handcrafted process made with love to ensure an emotional, timeless memory.

items.question: What occasions and events do you create songs for?
items.answer: We create personalized songs for virtually any special occasion! Some examples: **Birthdays** (children, adults, seniors), **Weddings** (ceremony, reception, bride's entrance), **Gender Reveals**, **Baby Showers**, **Housewarming Parties**, **Wedding Anniversaries** (silver, golden, diamond), **Mother's/Father's Day**, **Graduations**, **Retirements**, **Memorial Tributes** (in memoriam), **Marriage Proposals**, **Baptisms and Religious Events**, **Reconciliations and Apologies**, **Health Recovery Celebrations**, **Special Thank You's** and much more. If it comes from the heart, we turn it into music!

items.question: Do you create songs for businesses and corporate events?
items.answer: Yes! We create **jingles**, **advertising campaign songs**, **company anthems**, **institutional video soundtracks**, **corporate event music** (conventions, parties, awards ceremonies) and **personalized gifts for employees or clients**. Contact us for a custom quote.

items.question: Can I make a song for couples, families, or multiple people?
items.answer: Yes! You can create songs for couples, siblings, families, or groups of friends. Additionally, with the **Double the Emotion** option (+$49), you can create a second personalized song—either for the same person with a different story, or for another special person. Just select this option at checkout.

items.question: Can I choose the musical style (Country, Pop, etc.)?
items.answer: Absolutely! In our quiz, you can choose from Pop, Country, Acoustic, Rock, Gospel, and more. We craft the perfect melody to match the recipient's musical taste.

items.question: How much does it cost and how soon will I receive my song?
items.answer: We offer two plans: **Essential** for $99 (7-day delivery) and **Express VIP** for $148 (delivery within 24 hours with priority support). Both options include a complete, professionally produced song personalized with the story you share.

items.question: How will I receive my song and where can I play it?
items.answer: Your song arrives via email as a beautiful digital gift. You’ll get a permanent link to listen and share. Feel free to play it at parties, weddings, church services, or family gatherings—the music is yours forever.

items.question: Can I put my song on Spotify and other platforms?
items.answer: Yes! We offer **VIP Streaming Distribution** for $99 (available after your song is ready). Your song will be available on **Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Music, Amazon Music** and over 150 platforms. The song stays on the platforms forever under your name!
